title: Amethyst Material Pack for Basic Weapons
description: Material Pack for the Basic Weapons mod which adds amethyst weapons
body:
![badge with the text "requires mod basic weapons"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f3916821baec16a8354d4a97779a34d0b2e1c767.png) ### This is a materialpack for the Basic Weapons mod. #### Place it in the basicweapons_materialpacks folder in the minecraft root directory on both the server and client #### This folder is created automatically when running Basic Weapons the first time #
> Trying to install this as a vanilla resource or datapack will not function correctly. > Visit [www.khazoda.com/basicweapons/materialpacks](https://khazoda.com/basicweapons/materialpacks) to learn more about materialpacks, access the materialpack creator, and browse for other materialpacks. # # Amethyst Material Amethyst weapons' attack damage, attack speed and enchantability are all slightly higher than iron's, but their durability is impactfully reduced. Amethyst weapons will excel in the mid-game if you enjoy enchanting your weapons, especially with unbreaking and mending. ![Amethyst weapon sprites](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/896b750721b00fb7ba3206757c688f73a2762067.png) The Amethyst material's stats are as follows: ```json { "material_name": "amethyst", "durability": 150, "attack_damage_bonus": 2.5, "attack_speed_bonus": 0.3, "reach_bonus": 0, "enchantability": 18, "repair_ingredient": "minecraft:amethyst_shard" } ```
